thread.title: Junts completely rejects the motion of censure: “It is a fantasy”
thread.title_full: Junts completely rejects the motion of censure: “It is a fantasy”

author: admin_l6ma5gus
title: Junts completely rejects the motion of censure: “It is a fantasy”
text:
There is no water in the pool. Junts completely rules out the possibility of participating in a motion of censure against President Pedro Sánchez together with the PP and Vox. «We said it at the time and we repeat it now. “It is a fantasy,” the general secretary of Junts, Jordi Turull, concluded without hesitation, reiterating the position of a party that does not plan to go further hand in hand with the PP than the specific vote in certain circumstances in Congress, such as when, for example , they knocked down the path of deficit or the bill of the PSOE and the rest of the left-wing parties to modify the Urban Leases Law and limit seasonal and room rentals.
Turull made it clear. Junts’ position with respect to the PSOE will be decided “vote by vote” depending on whether it benefits Catalans : There is no commitment to Sánchez nor does there cease to be one. Although Junts’ position is modulating, trying, for example, to recover the traditional flag of CiU in defense of the interests of the Catalan company, the possibility of forming an alliance with the popular ones is unviable, among other things because the competition Vox would be essential for the motion to go forward, something unaffordable for both parties.
In Junts it is clear that its current strength, seven deputies essential to sustain the majority of the government, would vanish in another different scenario. This being the case, and despite the alliances with the right for specific votes, following the same strategy of the PNV, in Junts they neither have nor speculate on the possibility of a more solid agreement with the popular ones. Recently, the former president of the party, Laura Borràs, already removed from the command bridge, speculating with the idea that no partner is ruled out It was immediately denied by a leadership that prefers to have the PSOE on its knees.
For their part, in Genoa they continued yesterday with the same position of being an alternative, but without launching into some supports that recognize impossible in the current situation. In that sense, the popular prefer to appeal to the dignity of the partners, as Cuca Gamarra did yesterday: “Are you going to continue supporting a corrupt Government?”
#Junts #completely #rejects #motion #censure #fantasy
